description_long: This is a modern kitchen island unit featuring a built-in induction cooker and a sink. The countertop is a dark, stone-like material with a smooth, slightly glossy finish, and the cabinetry below is matte dark gray. The induction cooker is seamlessly integrated into the countertop, with a rectangular black cooking zone and touch controls likely positioned nearby. The sink is square with a metallic faucet, located at one end of the unit, while the induction cooker is positioned closer to the center. The cabinetry below consists of multiple large drawers or panels, providing ample storage space. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A sleek kitchen island with a built-in induction cooker and sink, featuring a dark stone countertop and matte gray cabinetry. The design is modern and minimalist, with integrated appliances and ample storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the kitchen island, with the induction cooker and sink both visible on the countertop.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the unit, with the sink and induction cooker both visible from above.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the induction cooker and sink from the opposite side, with cabinetry visible below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, emphasizing the length and showing the induction cooker and sink from a different angle.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is a flat, touch-sensitive area integrated into the black induction zone on the countertop, with no visible physical buttons or knobs. There are no visible labels, icons, or indicator lights in the provided views.
